title: Flintronic 5Pcs Nail Art Liner Brushes, Painting Design Brush Set, Fine Drawing Nail Dotting Drawing Tool for Long Lines, Thin Details, Fine Drawing Sizes 4/8/12/20/25mm for DIY & Professional
features: 【Package Content】You will receive 5 pieces of liner brushes, which heads have 5 sizes, including 4mm/0.16 inch, 8mm/0.32 inch, 12mm/0.47 inch, 20mm/0.79 inch and 25mm/1 inch. Sufficient quantity and sizes will meet your nail design needs.

【Premium Quality】High quality liner brushes are made of the finest nylon and each process uses the most stringent quality testing of its peers to ensure durability and a smooth, soft and pliable feel.

【Comfortable to Use】Our liner brushes are specifically designed with resilience in mind, allowing you to draw firm and unwavering lines without any deformation. The body of the nail art brush is light and comfortable, easy to hold and paint, helping create beautiful nail work without any hassle!
【Long-lasting & Corrosion-resistant】 The brush handles are crafted for durability and resistance to corrosion from cleaning solutions and alcohols, ensuring longevity and consistent performance.

【For All Skill Levels】 Whether you are a professional nail technician or a nail art hobbyist, this set provides the tools needed for intricate designs and flawless application. This portable and easy-to-use nail art pen is not only suitable for professional nail salons or home use, but also a perfect gift.
description: Directions: -Soak brush bristles in warm water to remove the wax layer, wipe excess residues off on a towel -After curing the colorgel , you can use a brush to create nail art on nails and cure for 60-90s -Apply top coat, cure for 60-90s -Use cleaner solution to clean the nail brush, then wipe the brush with cotton pads Product Specifications: Package Size: 22*7*0.8cm/8.6*2.7*0.3in Product Material: The rod is a metal aluminum rod, a copper-plastic tube, and nylon hair Weight: 40g Color: Pink Line brush size: 4mm, 8mm, 12mm, 20mm and 25mm Packing list: Nail art liner brushes*5 Note: 1.There may be some size errors within 0-1cm due to manual measurement. 2.There may be some weight errors within 0-1g due to manual measurement. 3.There may be some color differences due to different equipments. 4.We are committed to bringing customers a pleasant shopping experience. Please contact us if you have any questions. We will actively provide you with solutions and promise to bring you satisfaction service.
